title: October 31
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|October}}

'''October 31''' is the 304th day of the year (305th in leap years). There are 61 days remaining. It is known best for being the day on which Halloween, or All Hallows Eve, occurs.</noinclude>
*[[1940s#1949|1949]] – [[Colin Wilson (artist)|Colin Wilson]] is born.
*[[1960s|1962]] – [[Clint Bajakian]] is born.
*[[1970]] – [[Nolan North]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 88|''Star Wars Weekly'' 88]] published.
*[[1995]] – [[Droids (1995) 6|''Droids: Season of Revolt 2'']] published.
*1995 – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 4|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 4]] published.
*[[1998]] – [[Star Wars Insider 40|''Star Wars Insider'' 40]] published.
*[[2000]] – ''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]'' hardcover and audiobook published.
*[[2006]] – [[Wookieepedia]] reaches 40,000 articles.
*2006 – ''[[The New Essential Guide to Alien Species]]'' paperback published.
*[[2007]] – [[Legacy (2006) 17|''Legacy'' (2006) 17]] published.
*2007 – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Tales of the Jedi, Volume 1]]'' released.
*[[2008]] – ''[[Fists of Ion]]'' published on [[StarWars.com]]
*[[2009]] – "[[Planet of the Dead]]" re-published as a free mini-comic for Halloween.
*[[2012]] – [[Darth Maul—Death Sentence 4|''Darth Maul—Death Sentence'' 4]] published.
*[[2016]] – [[Autumn Hamill]] is born.
*[[2017]] – "[[The Happabore Hazard]]" airs on YouTube.
*[[2018]] – [[Star Wars Adventures: Tales from Vader's Castle 5|''Star Wars Adventures: Tales from Vader's Castle'' 5]] published.
*2018 – [[Star Wars Adventures (2017) 15|''Star Wars Adventures'' (2017) 15]] published.
*[[2019]] – ''[[I Am C-3PO: The Inside Story]]'' published.
*[[2023]] – ''[[Star Wars Legends: The Empire Omnibus Vol. 2]]'' published.
*2023 – ''[[Star Wars: The High Republic Adventures — The Monster of Temple Peak and Other Stories]]'' published.
*2023 – [[Star Wars Insider 222|''Star Wars Insider'' 222]] published.
*[[2024]] – [[Greg Hildebrandt]] dies.
*[[2025]] – "[[R2-D2 and BB-8's Super Snowy Shenanigans]]" released on [[StarWarsKids.com]].
<noinclude>
